task_completion.description: Navigate to the analytics-dashboard Deployment in the dashboard-prod namespace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the 'analytics-dashboard' Deployment in the 'dashboard-prod' namespace, likely in the 'Edit Config' or 'Edit YAML' view.

task_completion.description: Fix the ConfigMap volume mount to use subPath
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher 'Storage'/'Volumes' section or YAML editor, a ConfigMap volume is configured with the Mount Point '/etc/nginx/nginx.conf' and Sub Path 'nginx.conf'.

task_completion.description: Inject db-credentials Secret as environment variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher 'Environment Variables' section or YAML editor, an entry exists to load all variables from a Secret (envFrom), referencing 'db-credentials'.

task_completion.description: Add a Downward API volume for labels and annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher 'Storage'/'Volumes' section or YAML editor, a Downward API volume is added, mounted at '/etc/podinfo', with items mapping 'labels' to 'labels.txt' and 'annotations' to 'annotations.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new pods reach a healthy Running state
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the 'analytics-dashboard' workload or its pods in a green 'Active' or 'Running' state after the changes have been saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the Rancher web interface being used to edit the deployment, rather than a terminal window running kubectl commands.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the Rancher UI elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with Rancher form fields, dropdowns, or the built-in YAML editor, not just viewing static pages.

integrity.description: Agent only modified the specified deployment
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is only editing the 'analytics-dashboard' deployment in the 'dashboard-prod' namespace, without altering other workloads.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'dashboard-prod'. Deployment: 'analytics-dashboard'. Secret to inject: 'db-credentials'. The agent must use the Rancher UI at https://localhost to perform the repairs.
